title: Memcached listen_disabled_num Connection Overruns
spl:
index=cache sourcetype="memcached:stats"
| sort 0 _time
| delta listen_disabled_num as ldd_delta
| where ldd_delta > 0
| table _time, host, listen_disabled_num, ldd_delta
description: `listen_disabled_num` increments when connections are dropped because the listen backlog is full‚ÄĒclients experience timeouts.
value: Surfaces network or application storms exceeding Memcached accept capacity.
implementation: Alert on positive deltas; compare with `accepting_conns` and `curr_connections`. Scale out or raise backlog carefully with OS tuning.
visualization: Line chart (counter), alert feed (delta>0), correlation with app deploys.
detailedImplementation:
Prerequisites
‚ÄĘ Install and configure the required add-on or app: Custom scripted input (`stats`).
‚ÄĘ Ensure the following data sources are available: `index=cache` `sourcetype=memcached:stats` (`listen_disabled_num`).
‚ÄĘ For app installation, inputs.conf, and Splunk directory layout, see the Implementation guide: docs/implementation-guide.md

Step 1 ‚ÄĒ Configure data collection
Field must be extracted as numeric; some templates prefix `STAT`.

Step 2 ‚ÄĒ Create the search and alert
Run the following SPL in Search (then save as report or alert; adjust time range and threshold as needed):

```spl
index=cache sourcetype="memcached:stats"
| sort 0 _time
| delta listen_disabled_num as ldd_delta
| where ldd_delta > 0
| table _time, host, listen_disabled_num, ldd_delta
```

Understanding this SPL

**Memcached listen_disabled_num Connection Overruns** ‚ÄĒ See the description and value fields in this use case JSON.

Documented **Data sources**: `index=cache` `sourcetype=memcached:stats` (`listen_disabled_num`). **App/TA**: Custom scripted input (`stats`). Rename `index=` / `sourcetype=` to match your deployment.

**Pipeline walkthrough**

‚ÄĘ Scope to the documented index and sourcetype, then apply transforms, thresholds, and `timechart`/`stats` as in the SPL above.

Step 3 ‚ÄĒ Validate
Confirm events exist, field extractions match your format, and thresholds reflect production baselines.

Step 4 ‚ÄĒ Operationalize
Add to a dashboard or alert; document ownership. Suggested visuals: Line chart (counter), alert feed (delta>0), correlation with app deploys..
grandmaExplanation: We notice when your cache stops accepting new connections so you fix overload before apps hang.
